---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Capybara_AI
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits, and in what scenario?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Security & compliance considerations

How should this behave securely? Consider: tenant isolation, fail-closed
defaults, new secrets/env vars, data retention/GDPR, and audit implications.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you discarded them.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or references.
